All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

add() - Method in class Machine
reg += pop(current stack)

D

div() - Method in class Machine
reg /= pop(current stack)

I

isEmpty() - Method in class Machine
checks if the currently pointed stack is empty

M

Machine - Class in Unnamed Package
PAL machine state: N stacks, a movable head, and a single integer register
Machine(int) - Constructor for class Machine
machine constructor pretty self-explanatory, only writing this to get rid of warnings
movl() - Method in class Machine
moves head to the left
movr() - Method in class Machine
moves head to the right
mul() - Method in class Machine
reg *= pop(current stack)

P

pop() - Method in class Machine
publically accessible pop operation
push(int) - Method in class Machine
push operation(takes int)

S

stacklen() - Method in class Machine
unused code, might use later returns number of stacks in current machine
sub() - Method in class Machine
reg -= pop(current stack)
swap() - Method in class Machine
exchange reg with the top of the current stack

T

toString() - Method in class Machine
